message:
feat(fnp-linalg): add LU factorization, multi-RHS solve, and triangular solve

New public functions for scipy/numpy-compatible linear algebra:

- lu_factor_nxn() / lu_solve(): LU factorization with partial pivoting
  and forward/backward substitution solve (scipy.linalg.lu_factor/lu_solve
  compatible)
- solve_nxn_multi(): multi-RHS linear system solver using LU decomposition
  (numpy.linalg.solve compatible for matrix RHS)
- solve_triangular(): explicit forward/backward substitution solver
  (scipy.linalg.solve_triangular compatible)

Improved singularity detection in lu_decompose() using a relative
threshold (n * eps * max_abs) instead of exact zero comparison, which
is more numerically robust for poorly conditioned matrices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
